question: Will a province schedule a referendum to leave Canada before 2027?
narrative_context: Elections Alberta officially confirmed October 19, 2026 referendum date (April 2, 2026)
Separatist organizers gathered 177,732+ signatures by March 30, 2026 — exceeding threshold
Proposed referendum question approved by Elections Alberta (March 2026)
9-question referendum ballot confirmed by Elections Alberta (March 2026)
Alberta Forever Canada counter-petition also approved by Elections Alberta (March 2026)
evidence: Elections Alberta confirmed referendum scheduled for October 19, 2026 (April 2, 2026 statement)
CBC News: Proposed referendum question on separation from Canada approved by Elections Alberta (March 2026)
Bloomberg (March 31, 2026): Separatist organizers claim 177,732+ signatures gathered, exceeding legal threshold
APTN News: Alberta announces referendum date with 9 questions, separation question included (March 2026)
Elections Alberta official notice: Citizen Initiative Petition verified and approved (March 2026)
Timeline: Alberta Premier announced May 2025 that referendum would be held if signatures gathered; signature drive ran Jan 3—May 2, 2026
counter_evidence: Public polling shows only 29% of Albertans support separation vs. 65% support staying in Canada; legal challenges or signature verification failure remain theoretical risks, but Elections Alberta already approved the petition.
thesis: Alberta's referendum on provincial separation is now administratively certain. Elections Alberta has approved the separation question, verified the signature threshold, and confirmed October 19, 2026 as the referendum date. The question "Will a province schedule a referendum to leave Canada before 2027?" is essentially resolved unless Elections Alberta reverses its decision or a successful legal challenge blocks the referendum in the next 6 months—both now highly unlikely given official approval. Market pricing at 74.5% implies a 25.5% cancellation probability despite administrative confirmation. Our 95% estimate reflects the low remaining risk: the referendum is scheduled, approved, and funded by Elections Alberta.
x_thread: Alberta's independence referendum is administratively confirmed for October 19, 2026. Elections Alberta approved the question, verified signatures, and set the date. Market prices YES at 74.5% but we estimate 95%. 20.5pp gap.

The machinery is locked in: Elections Alberta approved the separation question in March, 177k+ signatures verified, October 19 date confirmed. Only legal challenge or government reversal could block it now—both unlikely after official approval.
